description_long: This object consists of two round-bottomed bottles, each with a wide, bulbous glass body and a narrow neck, secured by a thick brown leather harness that wraps around the midsection and neck. The left bottle contains a vivid red liquid, while the right bottle holds a bright blue liquid, both of which are clearly visible through the semi-transparent glass. Each bottle is topped with a conical, cork-like stopper, also encased in a leather collar, giving the bottles a secure and rustic appearance. The leather harness features metallic rivets and a strap, adding to the utilitarian design. The glass surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, with the colored liquids providing a striking contrast to the earthy brown leather. No visible labels or branding are present, and the bottles appear well-crafted and undamaged.
description: A pair of round, semi-transparent glass bottles with brown leather harnesses and cork stoppers, containing red and blue liquids.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bottles side by side, clearly displaying the red and blue liquids and the leather harnesses.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue liquid bottle in front, highlighting the thickness of the leather harness and the conical stoppers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both bottles, with the leather harnesses and the colored liquids still visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the red liquid bottle in front, emphasizing the rounded glass bodies and the secure leather straps.
